Localization.Description: A user added an object to Zabbix. This could be an attacker's attempt to disguise malicious activity, tools, or malware in the system.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} added application "{object.name}" to Zabbix on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} added host "{object.name}" to Zabbix on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} added service "{object.name}" to Zabbix on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} added detection rule "{object.name}" to Zabbix on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} added application configuration "{object.name}" to Zabbix on host {event_src.host}
